part.text: The `add` function is subtracting instead of adding when the first argument is negative. The bug is in the `add` function's negative number handling - it subtracts when it should add.

Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }
